center.name: Ernest Thomas Gilliard
center.summary: Ernest Thomas Gilliard是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Gilliard's honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Gilliard's honeyeater (Vosea whitemanensis) or the Bismarck honeyeater, is a bird species in the family Meliphagidae

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Gilliard's honeyeater (Vosea whitemanensis) or the Bismarck honeyeater, is a bird species in the family Meliphagidae
